trades.reasoning: Score 95 with optimal RSI 63.2, MACD bullish crossover, and a volume surge confirming institutional interest — price already 6% above SMA-20 with room before overbought territory.
Score 90 with RSI 65.3 in the bullish momentum zone and price 14% above SMA-20, signaling a strong breakout with MACD confirming upward direction.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted slightly higher today in a low-volatility, neutral session — S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ up 0.2%. The portfolio is performing well at +25.6% overall, and with 4 open slots and $943 cash sitting idle, deploying into the top-scoring names makes sense. I'm adding UTI and INFQ as the best risk-adjusted setups from the screener — both score high, sit in the optimal RSI zone, and show genuine volume/MACD confirmation rather than overbought chasing.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets edged higher in a quiet Monday session, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and NASDAQ adding 0.2%, as investors digested a holiday-shortened week ahead. The muted action reflected a lack of major catalysts, with traders holding positions cautiously ahead of upcoming economic data releases. Sector rotation continued modestly toward industrials and technology names showing strong technical momentum.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一小幅收高，標普500指數上漲0.4%，那斯達克指數上升0.2%，市場整體維持中性偏多格局。由於缺乏重大催化劑，投資者在等待即將發布的經濟數據前保持謹慎觀望態度。板塊輪動持續，工業股及具強勢技術面的科技股吸引部分資金流入。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, on the theory that assets moving higher tend to keep moving higher for a period of time. Indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) in the 55–70 range and MACD crossovers help identify stocks with healthy momentum — strong enough to continue rising but not yet overbought and due for a pullback. Both UTI and INFQ were selected today precisely because their signals sit in this 'sweet spot.'
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，核心理念是「強者恆強」——價格上行的資產往往在一段時間內持續走高。相對強弱指數（RSI）介於55至70之間、以及MACD黃金交叉等技術指標，有助於找出處於健康動能區間的股票——上升勢頭足夠持續，但尚未進入超買區域面臨回調風險。今日買入的UTI與INFQ，正是因為技術指標落在這個「黃金甜蜜點」而獲選。
